title: Cute Animal Models Backport
description: Backports the new 26.2 snapshot 2 cute baby animal models to previous versions!
body:
![Image showing all of the new baby entity models introduced in 26.1 snapshot 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6756c703b4e7e73c6a2b6edbbfbb09f92c88325b.webp) Backports the new 26.1 snapshot 2 baby and rabbit animal models to 1.21.11! (And in the future possibly even more versions!) To override the textures for if you want to make the eyes derpy, please refer to the [source code](https://github.com/michiel1106/cute-animals-backported-template-1.21.11/tree/master/src/main/resources), and follow the file structure to the texture you want.
Q&A Why did you even do this? - I kind of felt like it. Will you add any new animal models if they get added in new snapshots? - If enough people want me to then yes, likely. How do I change the texture and model to something I want? - The model cannot be changed unless you code your own mod, you can see how I did it and then add your own model, or use Entity Texture Features & Entity Model Features. If you want to change the texture then please refer to the text above the Q&A. Join the [discord](https://discord.gg/p6ShJPq98d) You can ask for help, a mod, just suggest something, hangout or request the source code of any mod I have made (if I still have the source code) Or donate to my [Kofi](https://ko-fi.com/bikerboys) incase you are feeling generous! Or if you want to help earn me a little cash with no extra cost to you, then please use this link to make a server on bisect hosting: https://url-shortener.curseforge.com/hknUB
